manifestPublicVariantSummary: Public staging uses a public manifest materialized as manifest.json with localhost and 127.0.0.1 host permissions only.
hostPermissionsNarrowingSummary: Public variant removed broad http and https wildcards.
stagingFolderSummary: artifacts/manual-qa/public-variant-staging is the controlled public candidate staging folder.
bridgeTokenReconnectFixSummary: Token required, token present, bridge unreachable, invalid token, and reconnect hardening paths were previously documented without exposing token values.
bridgeLivenessSummary: Local bridge liveness was previously verified; Chrome live evidence remains partial.
